summary: TemaDom Phase 3 Iteration 18 - Complete testing of 3-angle photo upload, video instructions, and room type for AI Designer. All 9 backend tests passed. All 15 frontend UI checks passed.
passed_tests: Backend (9/9):
✅ POST /api/ai-designer/generate rejects no images - returns 400
✅ POST /api/ai-designer/generate rejects empty images array - returns 400
✅ POST /api/ai-designer/generate accepts 'images' array field (timeout = AI processing started)
✅ POST /api/ai-designer/generate accepts room_type parameter
✅ GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns company plans: Базов, Про, Премиум
✅ GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns AI Designer as separate module
✅ GET /api/feedback returns feedback list with avg_rating and total
✅ GET /api/ - API root returns 200
✅ GET /api/categories - returns 15 categories
Frontend (15/15):
✅ AI Designer page loads at /ai-designer
✅ AI Designer step indicators: 1 Снимки → 2 Параметри → 3 Стил → 4 Варианти → 5 Резултат
✅ AI Designer has 4 video instruction cards
✅ AI Designer video content panel shows on card click
✅ AI Designer has 3 upload areas for 3 angles
✅ AI Designer first upload shows 'Задължителна'
✅ AI Designer 2nd/3rd uploads show 'Препоръчителна'
✅ AI Designer room-type-select exists in step 2
✅ Subscriptions page shows Базов/Про/Премиум for companies
✅ Subscriptions page shows AI Designer as separate module
✅ Feedback page at /feedback renders with star rating
✅ Navbar 'Още' dropdown has 'Обратна връзка' link
✅ Footer has logo and 'AI Дизайнер' link
✅ Homepage dark theme confirmed
✅ 'Видео инструкции' section present on AI Designer
critical_code_review_comments: AI Designer endpoint properly validates images array - returns 400 if empty or missing
AI Designer supports 1-3 images from different angles for enhanced accuracy
AI Designer sends all images to AI for comprehensive room analysis
Room type selection (9 options) correctly passed to backend
Video instruction cards (4) with expandable content panels
Subscription plans correctly separated: company (basic/pro/premium) vs AI Designer module
context_for_next_testing_agent: TemaDom Phase 3 Iteration 18 fully tested. NEW features verified: 1) AI Designer now supports 3 photo uploads from 3 different angles (Ъгъл 1 Фронтален, Ъгъл 2 Ляв/Десен, Ъгъл 3 Обратен), 2) 4 video instruction cards with expandable content, 3) Room type selection with 9 options (bathroom/kitchen/living_room/bedroom/kids_room/office/corridor/balcony/other), 4) Backend endpoint /api/ai-designer/generate accepts 'images' array and 'room_type' parameter, 5) Step indicators: Снимки → Параметри → Стил → Варианти → Резултат. AI generation takes 30-90 seconds - test timeout confirms endpoint accepts valid requests.

ai_designer_3_angle_upload.details: 3 upload areas present - first shows 'Задължителна', 2nd/3rd show 'Препоръчителна'

ai_designer_step_indicators.details: 5 steps: 1 Снимки → 2 Параметри → 3 Стил → 4 Варианти → 5 Резултат

ai_designer_video_instructions.details: 4 video cards with durations (0:45, 0:30, 0:40, 0:50) and expandable content

ai_designer_room_type.details: Room type select in step 2 with data-testid='room-type-select'

backend_images_array_validation.details: POST /api/ai-designer/generate returns 400 if no images or empty array

backend_images_array_accepts.details: Endpoint accepts images array - timeout during AI processing confirms request accepted

backend_room_type_accepts.details: Endpoint accepts room_type parameter - timeout confirms valid request

subscriptions_company_plans.details: Базов/Про/Премиум plans for companies displayed correctly

subscriptions_ai_designer_module.details: AI Designer shown as separate paid module (free in test mode)

feedback_page.details: Feedback page at /feedback with star rating form

footer_ai_designer_link.details: 'AI Дизайнер' link found in footer under 'За фирми'
